project_type: Angular frontend SPA (with mock interceptor for backend)
test_framework: Angular testing (Karma/Jasmine) - minimal test coverage observed
test_command: No existing tests observed for onboarding feature
verification_instructions: Build the Angular project to validate no TypeScript compilation errors. Manually verify template correctness by reviewing inline templates.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. No live backend - all data served by MockOnboardingInterceptor. Node.js v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Inline templates and styles used in most components (not separate .html/.scss files for onboarding components).
key_patterns: Components use inline template/styles. MockOnboardingInterceptor intercepts HTTP calls and returns mock data. Services use withAudit() to add metadata. Forms use Angular Reactive Forms with FormBuilder. Material Design components (MatDialog, mat-datepicker, mat-stepper) are used throughout.
directory_structure: sri-frontend/src/app/features/ contains feature modules. field-resource-management/components/onboarding/ has all internal onboarding components. public-onboarding/ has the public-facing form. Models in field-resource-management/models/, services in field-resource-management/services/, mock interceptor in field-resource-management/interceptors/.
